details: Package self-identifies as a dependency-confusion proof-of-concept targeting the @k18n npm scope, which is described as an internal scope used by Kuaishou that was unclaimed on the public registry. package.json declares a postinstall hook that runs index.js; the current index.js payload only prints a console message and performs no network I/O, no filesystem reads, and no exfiltration. The package squats an internal scope on the public registry, so any installer whose resolver misroutes @k18n/* to the public npm registry will install and execute this package's postinstall. The current payload is benign, but the version number (99.0.1) is chosen to win dependency-confusion resolution against the internal versions, and future versions published under this squatted scope by the same publisher could ship arbitrary code to those installers.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
